(17)²

(d) According to the question,
Original numbers 4 3 5 8 5 1 3 1 1 2 8 9 8 0
New arrangement 5 3 4 1 5 8 1 1 3 6 2 1 0 8 9

and smallest number = 089
∴ Required sum = 821 + 089 = 910

(d) According to the question,
Given numbers 315 117 472 301 137

From left 2nd

∴ Square of the digits sum = (11)² = 121
